tracks.rawText: 3:06Studio Selectionv5.5CoverAccusation: you’re hiding a house-techo dub house groove under all that misty atmosphere, Four-on-the-floor kick at 124 BPM, sidechained synth bass, white-noise riser, chopped female vocals drenched in heavy reverb, plus dub-style filtered delays and tape echo, Drums and lead synth fade out into a filtered vocal tail3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Studio Selection

tracks.rawText: 3:09Aikon - to you (Samuel Ares EDIT) [2309064623]v5.5CoverMaximum-intensity psytrance tribal from the first bar: pounding four-on-the-floor kick, sidechained synth bass, and dense driving percussion with congas, djembes, toms, shakers, and hand drums, Bright supersaw lead synth melody, chopped female vocals with heavy reverb, white-noise risers, and rhythmic vocal chops locked to a relentless high-BPM groove1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Aikon - to you (Samuel Ares EDIT) [2309064623]

tracks.rawText: 2:12Valery, trompeta sordav5.5Rap romántico con trompetas al frente: fanfarria de brass en staccato, mutes tipo Harmon, y capas de trompeta doblando la melodía sobre un beat de trap suave, Kick 808 profundo, snare seco con clap, hi-hats en tresillos, bajo sub con sidechain, pads oscuros, piano eléctrico con delay corto y ad-libs con autotune y reverb plate2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Valery, trompeta sorda
